description: Fix the concrete correctness gaps exposed after the definition-macro cutover without dragging the broader reconsideration work along. Scope: runtime module code must read in compiler-fragment mode; protocol modules must synthesize and publish `__info__/1`; nested `defimpl` protocol and `for:` target names must resolve through the live namespace instead of a parallel string-qualification side path; quoted-source macro execution must preserve procbin-backed payload lifetimes when a borrowed source process returns AST. Signal: the focused protocol/quoted-source regressions pass, long `@doc` payloads survive `Fz.Compiler.define`, and runtime/source publication no longer fatals on these cases.
title: Compiler2 definition-macro correctness: fix protocol publication and quoted-source procbin lifetime
